mapper.sql: A.ZIPCODE, A.SIDO, A.SIGUNGU, A.TOWN, A.ROADNAME, A.BLDG_MAINNO, A.BLDG_SUBNO, A.RI, A.LEGAL_DONG, A.DONG, A.JIBUN_BONBUN, A.JIBUN_BUBUN
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount FROM ( SELECT A.zipcode, A.SIDO || (CASE WHEN A.SIGUNGU IS NULL THEN '' ELSE ' ' || A.SIGUNGU END) || (CASE WHEN A.TOWN IS NULL THEN '' WHEN A.TOWN = 'NULL' THEN '' WHEN A.TOWN = '' THEN '' ELSE ' ' || A.TOWN END) || (CASE WHEN A.ROADNAME IS NULL THEN '' ELSE ' ' || A.ROADNAME END) || (CASE WHEN A.BLDG_MAINNO IS NULL THEN '' ELSE ' ' || A.BLDG_MAINNO END) || (CASE WHEN A.BLDG_SUBNO IS NULL THEN '' WHEN A.BLDG_SUBNO = '0' THEN '' ELSE '-'|| A.BLDG_SUBNO END) --|| (CASE WHEN A.BLDGNAME IS NULL THEN '' WHEN A.BLDGNAME = 'NULL' THEN '' WHEN A.BLDGNAME = '' THEN '' ELSE '(' || A.BLDGNAME || ')' END) AS NEWKADDR, A.SIDO || (CASE WHEN A.SIGUNGU IS NULL THEN '' ELSE ' ' || A.SIGUNGU END) || (CASE WHEN NVL(A.DONG, 'NULL') = 'NULL' AND NVL(A.LEGAL_DONG, 'NULL') != 'NULL' THEN ' ' || A.LEGAL_DONG WHEN NVL(A.LEGAL_DONG, 'NULL') = 'NULL' AND NVL(A.DONG, 'NULL') != 'NULL' THEN ' ' || A.DONG WHEN NVL(A.DONG, 'NULL') = 'NULL' AND NVL(A.LEGAL_DONG, 'NULL') = 'NULL' THEN '' ELSE ' ' || A.LEGAL_DONG END) || (CASE WHEN A.RI IS NULL THEN '' WHEN A.RI = 'NULL' THEN '' WHEN A.RI = '' THEN '' ELSE ' ' || A.RI END) || (CASE WHEN A.JIBUN_BONBUN IS NOT NULL THEN ' ' || A.JIBUN_BONBUN END) || (CASE WHEN A.JIBUN_BUBUN IS NULL THEN '' WHEN A.JIBUN_BUBUN = '0' THEN '' ELSE '-'|| A.JIBUN_BUBUN END) --|| (CASE WHEN A.BLDGNAME IS NULL THEN '' WHEN A.BLDGNAME = 'NULL' THEN '' WHEN A.BLDGNAME = '' THEN '' ELSE '(' || A.BLDGNAME || ')' END) AS PASTKADDR,
BIF.UF_CONVERT_HAN_TO_ENG(A.SIDO || (CASE WHEN A.SIGUNGU IS NULL THEN '' ELSE ' ' || A.SIGUNGU END) || (CASE WHEN A.TOWN IS NULL THEN '' WHEN A.TOWN = 'NULL' THEN '' WHEN A.TOWN = '' THEN '' ELSE ' ' || A.TOWN END) || (CASE WHEN A.ROADNAME IS NULL THEN '' ELSE ' ' || A.ROADNAME END) --|| (CASE WHEN A.BLDGNAME IS NULL THEN '' WHEN A.BLDGNAME = 'NULL' THEN '' WHEN A.BLDGNAME = '' THEN '' ELSE '(' || A.BLDGNAME || ')' END) || (CASE WHEN A.BLDG_MAINNO IS NULL THEN '' ELSE ' ' || A.BLDG_MAINNO END) || (CASE WHEN A.BLDG_SUBNO IS NULL THEN '' WHEN A.BLDG_SUBNO = '0' THEN '' ELSE '-'|| A.BLDG_SUBNO END),'Y') AS EADDR FROM BIF.TB_NEWZIPCODE A WHERE (UPPER( A.SIDO || ' ' || (CASE WHEN A.SIGUNGU IS NULL THEN '' ELSE A.SIGUNGU END) || ' ' || (CASE WHEN A.TOWN IS NULL THEN '' WHEN A.TOWN = 'NULL' THEN '' WHEN A.TOWN = '' THEN '' ELSE A.TOWN END) || ' ' || (CASE WHEN A.ROADNAME IS NULL THEN '' ELSE A.ROADNAME END) || ' ' || (CASE WHEN A.BLDG_MAINNO IS NULL THEN '' ELSE A.BLDG_MAINNO END) || (CASE WHEN A.BLDG_SUBNO IS NULL THEN '' WHEN A.BLDG_SUBNO = '0' THEN '' ELSE '-'|| A.BLDG_SUBNO END) || (CASE WHEN A.BLDGNAME IS NULL THEN '' WHEN A.BLDGNAME = 'NULL' THEN '' WHEN A.BLDGNAME = '' THEN '' ELSE '(' || A.BLDGNAME || ')' END) ) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{dong, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' OR UPPER (A.SIDO || ' ' || (CASE WHEN A.SIGUNGU IS NULL THEN '' ELSE A.SIGUNGU END) || ' ' || (CASE WHEN NVL(A.DONG, 'NULL') = 'NULL' AND NVL(A.LEGAL_DONG, 'NULL') != 'NULL' THEN ' ' || A.LEGAL_DONG WHEN NVL(A.LEGAL_DONG, 'NULL') = 'NULL' AND NVL(A.DONG, 'NULL') != 'NULL' THEN ' ' || A.DONG WHEN NVL(A.DONG, 'NULL') = 'NULL' AND NVL(A.LEGAL_DONG, 'NULL') = 'NULL' THEN '' ELSE ' ' || A.LEGAL_DONG END) || (CASE WHEN A.RI IS NULL THEN '' WHEN A.RI = 'NULL' THEN '' WHEN A.RI = '' THEN '' ELSE A.RI END) || ' ' || (CASE WHEN A.JIBUN_BONBUN IS NOT NULL THEN '' || A.JIBUN_BONBUN END) || (CASE WHEN A.JIBUN_BUBUN IS NULL THEN '' WHEN A.JIBUN_BUBUN = '0' THEN '' ELSE '-'|| A.JIBUN_BUBUN END) || (CASE WHEN A.BLDGNAME IS NULL THEN '' WHEN A.BLDGNAME = 'NULL' THEN '' WHEN A.BLDGNAME = '' THEN '' ELSE '(' || A.BLDGNAME || ')' END)) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{dong, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) || '%' ) )
